name: Red Coordinator
description: Config-driven singleton orchestrator + backbone. Gate node reads red-ops/config and deterministically routes run/stop (mode off|always|windows + until + enabled). On run, the Triage node (cheap tier) diffs /api/board + red-ops/state against its baseline and ends the tick for free when nothing is actionable; only an actionable tick reaches the CLI Coordinator, which discovers working-tagged projects, dispatches Red Workers, records red-ops/state, posts notes, and reaches out to @george when it needs direction. All steering editable live in red-ops/config.
